name: Grandma Kate's Chocolate Fudge
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Whole nuts (such as almonds or pecans)
recipeInstructions:
Blend together the sugar, flour and milk until smooth. Add unsweetened chocolate.
Heat gently on low to medium heat, stirring frequently, until mixture is smooth and set. This is best determined by stirring a small amount in a dish. Add a small amount of salt, butter (about the size of an egg).
Cool before stirring further. Add whole nuts and vanilla extract. Cut into squares once cooled completely.
